However, even if interpreted broadly, such bodies would still fall outside direct WHO-recommended actions unless specifically mentioned in guidance documents. Given that none of the listed measures directly correspond to established WHO tools beyond those already acknowledged, I maintain that the best-supported inference remains that "chair side council" lacks legitimacy here.
